specific_location: 2925 Glenwood Dr. in the trees around the parking lot for Glenlake Apartments
description: Most obvious field mark were extremely prominent white wing bars, eye ring and secondary edging. Throat was bright white contrasting well with dark slaty color of the head. Yellow wash on the flanks was clearly defined and a bright yellow color. The dark slaty head contrasted well with a greenish back.Behaviors: Bird was foraging in the open in a few small trees.Call: SilentPlumage: Adult
